metadata.description: Reference agents and skills for strategy and transformation work — consulting craft, corporate strategy, market intelligence, digital transformation, org design and decision rights, performance management, balanced scorecards, OKRs, transformation PMO, and post-investment value realisation.

plugins.name: consulting
plugins.description: Strategic narrative, hypothesis-driven problem solving, and deliverable craft — Minto pyramid structure, hypothesis trees, hypothesis-driven workplans, deck outlines, exec memos, so-what sharpening, and doc/deck review.

plugins.name: corporate-strategy
plugins.description: Growth strategy, portfolio and resource allocation, and strategic options — growth-gap diagnostics, resource-misallocation detection, exit-or-double-down portfolio calls, real-options-framed strategic decisions, build-vs-buy-vs-partner, and synergy stress-testing.

plugins.name: market-intelligence
plugins.description: Competitive landscape, incentive mapping, positioning, and information asymmetry — strategic-group mapping with mobility-barrier analysis, incentive-driven behavior prediction, positioning trade-off discipline, information-asymmetry analysis, and game-theory-grounded competitive response forecasting.

plugins.name: transformation
plugins.description: Digital maturity assessment, Now/Next/Later transformation roadmaps, target operating model design, technology strategy briefs, and transformation business cases.

plugins.name: operating-model
plugins.description: Org design and decision rights — structure-strategy fit diagnostics, single-point-accountability RACI/RAPID design, span-of-control and layers analysis, matrix-reporting stress tests, and Star Model alignment between structure, process, rewards, and people.

plugins.name: performance
plugins.description: KPI trees, metrics tracker builder, metrics glossary, and performance narratives.

plugins.name: balanced-scorecard
plugins.description: Strategy maps and balanced scorecards — perspective design, causal-link strategy mapping, lead/lag measure selection, target-and-initiative setting, cascaded business-unit scorecards, and periodic reviews that test the strategy's causal theory, not just the numbers.

plugins.name: okr
plugins.description: Objectives and Key Results — drafting objectives that aren't disguised metrics, writing outcome-based key results, target calibration, cascading with conflict detection, confidence-based check-ins, and end-of-cycle scoring with retro.

plugins.name: pmo
plugins.description: RAID logs, status reporting, steering committee packs, milestone tracking, and decision logs for running a transformation program.

plugins.name: value-realisation
plugins.description: Benefits mapping, baseline-and-accountability discipline, realisation tracking with attribution rigor, at-risk recovery decisions, and post-implementation review — closes the loop from an approved business case to proven delivered value.

plugins.name: strategy-builder-hub
plugins.description: Finds, evaluates, and installs community strategy skills with a security review gate before anything lands in your environment.
